name: SAP S/4HANA Migration (DACH, cross-industry)
description: Cross-industry horizontal market for SAP ECC-to-S/4HANA migration services, driven by the 2027 end-of-mainstream-maintenance deadline. Targets any enterprise running SAP that needs RISE with SAP, greenfield/brownfield migration, and managed SAP operations on cloud.

segmentation.buyer_profile: SAP Program Director, CIO, CFO (TCO decisions), Head of ERP
drivers: Cost optimization via FinOps for SAP landscapes

sizing.methodology: LLM estimation: ~30,000 SAP customers in DACH, large portion still on ECC

tam.description: Total SAP migration and hosting services market in DACH through 2028 (~EUR 10B cumulative)

sam.description: Portion addressable by T-Systems as SAP Platinum Partner with RISE premium supplier status

som.description: Realistic capture leveraging 4,000+ SAP experts, 850K managed SAP users, and RISE certification

competitive_landscape: All for One Group, SNP/CrystalBridge, Accenture, IBM, Deloitte, NTT DATA, AWS/Azure native SAP hosting
